faults.title: Door not locked
faults.description: Check latch, interlock, strike, and control lock signal.

faults.title: Water inlet issue
faults.description: Inspect valves, water pressure, and inlet strainers.

faults.title: Drain issue
faults.description: Check filter, drain pump, and drain hose blockage.

faults.title: AquaStop leak issue
faults.description: Inspect base tray, leak sensor, and hose assembly.

faults.title: Pump / sensor issue
faults.description: Check pump impeller, circulation path, or sensor line.

faults.title: Door / lock circuit fault
faults.description: Inspect lock assembly and harness.

parts.notes: Match latch type and connector style.

Verify resistance curve and connector type.

Confirm drum opening diameter and recirculation nozzle positions.
